title: Add coverage for Virtuus _python __version__ metadata+fallback paths

comments.author: derek
comments.text: CI coverage failed at python/src/virtuus/_python/__init__.py lines 18-25 (VERSION-file fallback path). Adding direct unit tests for metadata-success and PackageNotFoundError fallback branches.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Added Behave coverage scenario + step to force PackageNotFoundError and execute _python._read_version() fallback file path branch. Validation: cargo build + python coverage run/report now shows src/virtuus/_python/__init__.py at 100%.
